text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 139 

GAP_LTCP_COPAY_B_DAILY 

LABEL: Gap Long Term Care Pharmacy Copay for 1-day supply of brand name drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 1-day supply of brand name drugs on 
this tier, using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_LTCP_COPAY_B_DAILY
